_categoryNotes.purpose: Traits that affect learning, wisdom, self-improvement, personal development, adaptability, resilience, and long-term character growth.

traits.name: DeepThinker
traits.description: Naturally spends time reflecting on experiences, decisions, and life lessons.
traits._traitPurpose: Creates thoughtful characters who learn from experience.
traits._howItChangesCharacter: Thinks before acting and searches for deeper meaning.
traits._designNotes: Excellent for mentors, philosophers, and wise characters.

_effectNotes.Knowledge: More likely to learn from experiences.

traits._growthNotes: Often develops after meaningful life events.
traits._conflictNotes: Reflection and impulsiveness oppose one another.

traits.name: OldSoul
traits.description: Possesses unusual wisdom and maturity for their age.

traits.name: Mentor
traits.description: Actively helps others learn and improve themselves.

traits.name: LearnsFromFailure
traits.description: Uses setbacks as opportunities for improvement.

traits.name: NeverGivesUp
traits.description: Persistently continues despite obstacles and setbacks.

traits.name: GrowthMindset
traits.description: Believes abilities and skills can improve through effort.

traits.name: SelfReflective
traits.description: Regularly evaluates personal actions and motivations.

traits.name: WiseCounsel
traits.description: Provides thoughtful advice and guidance to others.

traits.name: AdaptableSurvivor
traits.description: Thrives despite adversity and changing circumstances.

traits.name: PersonalTransformer
traits.description: Capable of dramatically changing and improving over time.

traits.name: StuckInPast
traits.description: Struggles to move beyond past failures and experiences.

traits.name: VictimMentality
traits.description: Frequently believes life circumstances are always someone else's fault.

traits.name: SelfSabotaging
traits.description: Undermines personal progress through harmful decisions.

traits.name: ClosedMinded
traits.description: Resists new information, ideas, and perspectives.

traits.name: BlameShifter
traits.description: Avoids responsibility by blaming others.

traits.name: FearOfChange
traits.description: Feels uncomfortable with major life changes.

traits.name: ComfortSeeker
traits.description: Avoids difficult situations in favor of comfort and security.

traits.name: LearnedHelplessness
traits.description: Believes effort will not improve outcomes.

traits.name: ArrogantLearner
traits.description: Believes there is little left to learn from others.

traits.name: AvoidsResponsibility
traits.description: Avoids accountability and personal ownership.
